hero.sub: Manage sales, inventory, HR, and finance — in Arabic and English — from one platform built for Oman and the GCC.
hero.trialNote: 14-day free trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

languages.title: Built for every team in the GCC
languages.sub: Switch between Arabic, English, Hindi, Bengali, and Urdu instantly. Your data stays the same — only the interface changes.

modules.title: Pay only for what you use
modules.sub: Start with Sales & Invoicing included free in your base plan. Add modules as your business grows — just like Odoo, but priced for the GCC.
modules.estimateNote: Based on selected modules. Users billed separately.

sales.title: Sales & CRM
sales.desc: Quotes, invoices, client pipeline, payment tracking and follow-ups.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.desc: Track stock, locations, and reorder levels in real time.

hr.title: HR & Payroll
hr.desc: Attendance, leave management, payroll, and employee portal.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.desc: Double-entry ledger, bank reconciliation, and VAT returns.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing
manufacturing.desc: Bill of materials, work orders, and production planning.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.desc: P&L, cash flow, aged receivables, and custom dashboards.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.sub: All prices in Omani Rial (OMR). 20% off on annual plans.
pricing.trialNote: 14-day free trial on all plans · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For freelancers and very small teams

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing businesses that need more

addons.title: Need something specific?
addons.subtitle: Add individual modules to any plan. Pay only for what you need.

trust.title: Built in Oman, for Oman and the GCC
trust.sub: We understand the local regulatory environment, Arabic business culture, and the unique challenges of running a business in Oman, Bahrain, and the UAE.

footer.tagline: The ERP for growing GCC businesses. Made in Oman.
